Therefore, we infer that the oxygen sensor test pass must be part of the self-test passing, i.e., in all cases where the self-test is confirmed (selfTestPass), the oxygen sensor test must also have passed (testOxygenSensorPass). This is best represented as: whenever the self-test passes, the oxygen sensor test must also have passed. This captures the notion that the confirmation of self-test completion should coincide with the confirmation of a calibrated oxygen sensor.
